title: Invideo MCP Server for Claude
author: invideo
detailMarkdown:
# Invideo MCP Server for Claude

Build video creation capabilities into your applications

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status invideo
```

## Config
```json
{
  "invideo": {
    "url": "https://mcp.invideo.io/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status invideo
